title: Link collection page
description: A curated page of external links grouped into collapsible sections. Source of truth for a generated links page (e.g. the Mastodon posts page).

slug.description: URL slug / output filename, e.g. mastodon-posts.

description.description: Intro prose shown atop the page. May contain markdown [label](url) links.

heading.description: Optional group divider rendered as a heading ABOVE this section, to separate blocks of sections (e.g. "Older media items").

description.description: Optional lead-in for the section; may contain markdown [label](url) links.

entries.description: Link entries. Each is one line of text with markdown [label](url) links inline (so an entry can carry a title, date, and several links). Everything outside the brackets renders as plain text.
